analysis: The project currently has a black hole theme with CSS animations and interactive elements. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for a test-website, along with some additional files for other platforms. The current theme focuses on cosmic visuals, animations, and interactive slides related to black holes. The CSS file is incomplete and needs to be fully developed to enhance the dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
